parameters.query:
INSERT INTO properties (listing_id, title, price, price_currency, bedrooms, bathrooms, property_type, suburb, city, province, url, source, description, agent_name, images, scraped_at, status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.listing_id }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.price }},
  '{{ $json.price_currency }}',
  {{ $json.bedrooms }},
  {{ $json.bathrooms }},
  '{{ $json.property_type }}',
  '{{ $json.suburb }}',
  '{{ $json.city }}',
  '{{ $json.province }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.seller_name }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.images) }}',
  '{{ $json.scraped_at }}',
  '{{ $json.status }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (listing_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, listing_id, title, price;

INSERT INTO fb_group_raw_posts (post_id, group_name, author_name, post_text, post_url, post_date, images, scraped_at, has_valid_price)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.listing_id }}',
  '{{ $json.source_group }}',
  '{{ $json.seller_name }}',
  '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.post_date }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.images) }}',
  '{{ $json.scraped_at }}',
  false
)
ON CONFLICT (post_id) DO NOTHING;
